testcase.name: chat_rejectsWrongProtocol

testcase.name: chat_happyPath_generatesConversationIdAndReply
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-17T10:36:57.804+03:00 INFO 34688 --- [ main] com.kdiag.server.api.ChatController : Incoming Request: conv_id=null protocol=kdiag/1.0 2026-06-17T10:36:57.805+03:00 INFO 34688 --- [ main] com.kdiag.server.api.ChatController : Message: My pod is in CrashLoopBackOff 2026-06-17T10:36:57.805+03:00 INFO 34688 --- [ main] com.kdiag.server.api.ChatController : Received request: proto=kdiag/1.0 conv=null hasArtifacts=true 2026-06-17T10:36:57.806+03:00 INFO 34688 --- [ main] com.kdiag.server.ai.AiEngine : Artifact budget: rawTotal=34, allocated=34, ragChars=14175, perArtifact=[34] Hibernate: SELECT useful_urls FROM problem_resolutions WHERE feedback >= 1 AND useful_urls IS NOT NULL 2026-06-17T10:36:57.857+03:00 INFO 34688 --- [ main] c.k.s.a.f.FeedbackRetrievalService : Reloaded boosted-URL cache: 0 URLs 2026-06-17T10:36:57.860+03:00 WARN 34688 --- [ main] c.k.server.ollama.OllamaEmbeddingClient : OllamaEmbeddingClient.embed() failed: Connection refused: getsockopt: localhost/127.0.0.1:11434 2026-06-17T10:36:57.860+03:00 WARN 34688 --- [ main] c.k.s.a.f.FeedbackRetrievalService : Embedding model unavailable (nomic-embed-text).
